meta_title: For Founders: marketing automation to Solve no coding experience (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to marketing automation and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Founders: Marketing Automation for Non-Coders (AI Checklist)
content.seo_description: Overcome coding barriers with this expert guide to marketing automation. Leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to build revenue-generating systems today.
content.answer_block: You don't need a CS degree to dominate your market. By leveraging AI-native tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can architect sophisticated marketing automation workflows that trigger lead generation, email nurturing, and customer segmentation—all without writing a single line of manual code. Focus on the logic, let AI handle the syntax.
content.intro:
The market doesn't care about your tech stack; it cares about the value you deliver. For the founder trapped in the 'no-code' plateau, the frustration is real: you have the vision for a high-converting funnel, but the technical barrier feels like a concrete wall. You are burning cycles on manual outreach while your competitors are scaling with automated precision.

It is time to bridge the gap. By shifting your mindset from 'building code' to 'orchestrating agents,' you can bypass traditional development hurdles. Using Antigravity for rapid prototyping and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can deploy professional-grade marketing automation that works while you sleep.

steps.title: Define Your Conversion Logic
steps.description: Before automating, map the customer journey. Identify the specific trigger (e.g., newsletter signup) and the desired outcome (e.g., personalized email sequence).
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS architect. Create a flow diagram for a marketing automation sequence that tags users based on their interaction level and triggers a personalized email sequence via SendGrid.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a JSON schema for a user-event tracking system that integrates with a marketing CRM.'

steps.title: Architect the Data Pipeline
steps.description: Establish a robust way to capture leads. Use Antigravity to define the structure of your data collection, ensuring it is ready for CRM ingestion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a schema for a Lead object capturing email, acquisition source, and behavioral tags. Ensure compatibility with standard REST APIs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Create a validation script for lead data incoming from webhooks to ensure clean CRM records.'

steps.title: Build the Automation Logic
steps.description: Transform your logic into executable code. Use Claude Code to translate your business rules into a functional automation script.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Python-based automation script that watches for new leads, checks their domain, and updates their lifecycle stage in the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the automation logic using an async pattern to handle high-volume lead influx efficiently.'

steps.title: Integrate Email Orchestration
steps.description: Connect your automation to an ESP. This turns your logic into active customer communication.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a template for an email trigger function using the SendGrid API that pulls dynamic data from the lead object.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure the environment variables and API integration for secure email delivery via SendGrid.'

steps.title: Stress Test and Deploy
steps.description: Verify your system under load. Use AI to simulate edge cases and ensure no lead is left behind.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of unit tests for the marketing automation pipeline, specifically testing for empty data fields and API rate limit handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Execute full-stack test suite and provide a summary of potential failure points in the workflow.'

pro_tips: Always build for idempotency; ensure your automation can run multiple times on the same lead without creating duplicate records.
Use 'Shadow Mode' where your automation logs actions to a text file before actually firing emails, so you can audit logic without spamming users.
Tag your leads with 'intent scores' based on engagement; prioritize your manual sales outreach for leads with scores over 80.
Leverage Claude Code to document your own code as you build; it makes future maintenance significantly faster for non-technical founders.
Monitor your API usage costs daily; AI-driven loops can accidentally trigger thousands of requests if not gated by proper conditional logic.
content.next_steps: Once your first automation is live, focus on A/B testing your email copy and refining your lead scoring criteria based on real conversion data.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for the sake of building—start engineering for revenue. Your competitive advantage lies in speed and intelligent orchestration. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
